name: meilisearch
tagline: A fast, open source search engine with a simple REST API
description: Meilisearch is a lightning-fast, open-source search engine with instant results and typo tolerance. It exposes a simple REST API and is designed for simplicity, enabling developers to self-host a search service easily.

features.title: Search Engine
features.description: Provide fast full-text search for applications

features.title: REST API
features.description: Index and query data through an HTTP API

features.title: Relevance Tuning
features.description: Adjust ranking rules and search behavior

features.title: Filtering and Sorting
features.description: Filter and sort search results by attributes

features.title: Language Support
features.description: Handle multiple languages and tokenization rules

features.title: Self-Hosted Service
features.description: Run the search engine on your own infrastructure
